mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('file') FROM dual
INSERT INTO files (id, user_id, created_on) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)

SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('file_detail') FROM dual
INSERT INTO file_detail ( id, file_id, original_name, stored_name, extension, file_size, is_delete, version, root_id, created_on ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{fileId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{extension}, #{fileSize}, 'N', 1, #{rootId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('docs') FROM dual
INSERT INTO docs (id, project_id, title, content, doc_type, file_id, user_id, created_on) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{doc.title}, #{doc.content}, #{doc.doctype}, #{fileId}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE docs SET title = #{title}, doc_type = #{doctype}, content = #{content}, edited_on = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, doc_type as doctype, user_id as userName, created_on as createdOn FROM docs ORDER BY created_on DESC

SELECT fd.id, fd.file_id as fileId, fd.original_name as name, fd.stored_name as storedName, fd.extension, fd.file_size as size FROM file_detail fd INNER JOIN docs d ON fd.file_id = d.file_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND fd.is_delete = 'N' AND fd.version = ( SELECT MAX(version) FROM file_detail WHERE root_id = fd.root_id AND is_delete = 'N' )
